metadata.title: Thematic Network Template
metadata.description: Fill this file with your manually defined themes, text links, and confirmed passages.

themes.label: Example Theme
themes.description: Write a short scholarly description of the theme here.

confirmedPassages.note: Why this passage belongs to the theme.
Why this passage belongs to the theme.

links.basis: Shared theme, vocabulary, motif, or direct comparison.

passagePairs.note: Explain the relationship between these two passages.

notes: Use status values such as draft, reviewed, or confirmed.
Use strength to control network edge thickness later: 1 = weak, 2 = medium, 3 = strong.
Add as many themes, confirmedPassages, and links as needed.
Keep textId values matching one of: dd, py, wz, nm.
